---
title: "Devansh Sachar"
image: "files/profile.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:dsachar@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/rsm-dsachar
---

## 👋 Hi, I'm Devansh

I’m a **Business Analytics graduate student at UC San Diego** and a former **Data Analyst at Bank of America**, specializing in building scalable data-driven solutions.

---

## 🚀 Impact Highlights

- ⏱️ Saved **3+ hours daily** across 7 departments and 250+ employees
- 📊 Built data systems supporting **60M+ global clients**
- ⚡ Reduced data latency by **60%** using cloud-based ETL pipelines
- 🎯 Improved prediction accuracy by **9%** using NLP + ML models

---

## 💼 Professional Experience

### Bank of America — Data Analyst
- Built **sentiment-aware fault prediction system** using VADER + BERT, improving accuracy by 9% and reducing response time by 20%
- Automated workflows using **Alteryx, Python, and SQL**, saving hours daily across multiple teams
- Designed **cloud-native ETL pipelines (Informatica + GCP)** reducing latency by 60%
- Achieved **99.7% reconciliation accuracy** in financial workflows

### Ericsson — Data Analytics Intern
- Improved global network performance by **8%** using Python and Grafana dashboards
- Processed **1.5 TB/day data** using Apache Spark for real-time anomaly detection

### Evalueserve — Business Analytics Intern
- Performed **customer segmentation on 2M+ records**, increasing campaign ROI by 15%
- Improved lead conversion by 12% and reduced acquisition cost by 9%

---

## 📊 Featured Projects

### 🔹 Customer Segmentation
- Built clustering models on large datasets
- Improved targeting and marketing efficiency

### 🔹 Sentiment Analysis on Financial News
- Developed NLP pipeline (NLTK, TF-IDF, ML models)
- Achieved **87% accuracy** in sentiment prediction

### 🔹 Sneakeronomics
- Applied XGBoost + regression on resale data
- Identified drivers of price appreciation

---

## 🛠 Tools & Technologies

**Languages:** Python, SQL
**ML & AI:** NLP, Machine Learning, Generative AI
**Tools:** Alteryx, Tableau, Power BI, Snowflake
**Big Data:** Apache Spark, Kafka
**Other:** Excel, VBA, ETL Pipelines

---

## 📬 Let’s Connect

- 📧 dsachar@ucsd.edu
- 💻 GitHub: rsm-dsachar
- 🔗 LinkedIn
